simple_types.name: BR_SMP_Field
simple_types.code:
type BR_SMP_Field is
   ONCE,
   THREE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: ONCE
enumeration_literals.description:
The incoming bit stream is sampled three times with a period of a MCK clock
period, centered on sample point.

simple_types.name: MMR0_MOT_Field
simple_types.code:
type MMR0_MOT_Field is
   MB_DISABLED,
   MB_RX,
   MB_RX_OVERWRITE,
   MB_TX,
   MB_CONSUMER,
   MB_PRODUCER)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: MB_DISABLED
enumeration_literals.description:
Reception Mailbox. Mailbox is configured for reception. If a message is
received while the mailbox data register is full, it is discarded.

enumeration_literals.name: MB_RX
enumeration_literals.description:
Reception mailbox with overwrite. Mailbox is configured for reception. If a
message is received while the mailbox is full, it overwrites the previous
message.

enumeration_literals.name: MB_RX_OVERWRITE
enumeration_literals.description: Transmit mailbox. Mailbox is configured for transmission.

enumeration_literals.name: MB_TX
enumeration_literals.description:
Consumer Mailbox. Mailbox is configured in reception but behaves as a
Transmit Mailbox, i.e., it sends a remote frame and waits for an answer.

enumeration_literals.name: MB_CONSUMER
enumeration_literals.description:
Producer Mailbox. Mailbox is configured in transmission but also behaves
like a reception mailbox, i.e., it waits to receive a Remote Frame before
sending its contents.

simple_types.name: MR_RXSYNC_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_RXSYNC_Field is
   DOUBLE_PP,
   DOUBLE_PN,
   SINGLE_P,
   NONE)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: DOUBLE_PP
enumeration_literals.description:
Rx Signal with Double Synchro Stages (One Positive Edge and One Negative
Edge)

enumeration_literals.name: DOUBLE_PN
enumeration_literals.description: Rx Signal with Single Synchro Stage (Positive Edge)

enumeration_literals.name: SINGLE_P
enumeration_literals.description: Rx Signal with No Synchro Stage
